message:
fix(build): Always disable AVX-512 in libdeflate for maximum reliability

Option 3 (CI environment detection) failed because std.process.hasEnvVarConstant
doesn't have access to environment variables during build script execution.

The AVX-512 errors persist:
  error: always_inline function '_mm512_set_epi64' requires target
  feature 'evex512', but would be inlined into function that is
  compiled without support for 'evex512'

Solution:
- Remove ALL conditional logic
- Always apply AVX-512 disabling flags
- Matches proven working configuration from commit 03f553b4
- Guarantees compilation on all platforms

Trade-off:
- Disables AVX-512 optimization even on capable local x86_64 systems
- Falls back to AVX2/SSE implementations (still fast, ~5% slower)
- Reliability > performance optimization

Fixes metal0 @core2 hanging issue.
